label: Ritual outcome comp (at least one spectator)
description: Applies qualityOffset when at least one non-role pawn attended as a spectator for at least half the ritual.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display label shown when the spectator condition is met.

labelAbstract.label: Label (abstract)
labelAbstract.description: Alternative label used when no live ritual is available.

qualityOffset.label: Quality offset
qualityOffset.description: Quality offset applied when at least one spectator is present.

labelNotMet.label: Label (not met)
labelNotMet.description: Label shown in the UI when no spectator is present.
